Hero.description: Discover the finest selection of premium dates, nuts and artisan chocolate, masterfully created by Naema

Shop.greatBox: A great box starts with carefully selected <dates>dates,</dates> roasted <nuts>nuts,</nuts> and rich artisan <chocolate>chocolate.</chocolate>
Shop.bestSellersDesc: Our most loved products, trusted by thousands of customers.
Shop.latestDropsDesc: From classic whole dates to gourmet stuffed varieties – find your perfect match.

About2.description: Naema was created with a deep appreciation for exceptional dates, premium nuts, and thoughtful craftsmanship — bringing together rich flavour, everyday luxury, and carefully sourced ingredients in every collection we create.

About.heroDesc: Discover the craftsmanship, quality, and care behind everything we create.
About.missionDesc: We source premium dates, chocolate, nuts, and dry fruits with a focus on quality and freshness. Every collection is thoughtfully curated for rich flavour, elegant presentation, and ingredients worth sharing.
About.founderQuote: "Naema was never just about dates — it was about bringing something truly pure to your table. We set out with one belief: that premium quality, honest sourcing, and real care could exist in every box we send. Every date we pick, every nut we select, carries that same intention — to give you nothing less than nature's finest."
About.founderAttrib: — The Naema Team, Founded in Kuwait
About.valuesDesc: Quality shows up in the everyday choices — how our dates are grown, how they're sourced, and how they're packed. We work with growers who care for their land and deliver nothing less than the finest to your door.
About.val1Desc: Every date and nut traced back to its orchard. No shortcuts, no compromise.
About.val2Desc: Pure as nature intended. Nothing artificial ever makes it into our products.
About.val3Desc: We work only with growers who respect the land and the people who work it.
About.val4Desc: Every product is held to the same uncompromising standard before it reaches you.
About.philoDesc: Naema is built around generosity, gathering, and thoughtful gifting — creating collections designed to be shared and remembered.
About.card1Desc: Rooted in timeless hospitality, every Naema collection carries the warmth of shared tables and meaningful gatherings.
About.card2Desc: Thoughtfully curated to bring people closer — from quiet evenings at home to generous celebrations with family and friends.
About.card3Desc: Created for gifting, sharing, and memorable moments that deserve something beautifully crafted and deeply satisfying.
About.block1Desc: Our dates begin their journey in the sun-drenched orchards of India, carefully hand-picked at peak ripeness. We build lasting relationships with our growers — people who know their land and treat every harvest with deep respect.
About.block2Desc: Every product in our collection is assembled with care — from stuffed dates and roasted nuts to our artisan chocolate range. No shortcuts, no fillers. Just premium ingredients brought together thoughtfully.
About.block3Desc: From the moment an order is placed, we move fast. Every Naema box is packed to preserve freshness and delivered with the same care we put into sourcing — because the last mile matters just as much as the first.

Contact.label: Contact Us
Contact.heroDesc: Questions about gifting, wholesale, orders, or custom collections? Reach out and our team will get back to you shortly.
Contact.leftDesc: Whether you're planning corporate gifting, sourcing premium products for your café, or simply have a question about your order, we're here to help.
Contact.subject: Subject
Contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...

item1.author: Amina K.

item2.quote: Fresh, crunchy, and packed beautifully. You can really taste the quality.
item2.author: Rahul M.

item3.quote: The perfect balance of texture and sweetness. My family finished it instantly.

item4.quote: Luxury chocolate that actually tastes handcrafted.
item4.author: Yousef T.

item5.quote: Elegant packaging and incredible flavour in every bite.
item5.author: Leena F.

ComboBundle.title: Indulgence, once isn't enough
ComboBundle.description: Sweet, soft, and made to be savored — our dates are more than just a treat. They're little moments of joy you'll find yourself coming back to, again and again.

ValueSection.title: Nature's <finest>Finest</finest>, Delivered with Purpose.
ValueSection.subtitle: Where Quality is Not a Promise — It's Our Standard.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We never settle. Every product meets the highest standard before it reaches you.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Our word is our bond. Reliable and consistent, every single time.

authenticity.title: Authenticity
authenticity.description: Genuine sourcing, true to nature. Nothing artificial, ever.

premium.title: Premium
premium.description: Luxury in every grain and date we carefully deliver to you.

commitment.title: Our Unbreakable <commitment>Commitment</commitment>
commitment.description: We will never compromise on quality, freshness, or delivery. From our sourcing partners to your doorstep — every Naema product carries the same unwavering promise of excellence, rooted in the finest orchards across India.
